safe_claim: repository identifiers are broadly available in the studied snapshot
construct_risk: snapshot is query-based, not a full Hugging Face census

safe_claim: artifact roles can be inferred at scale with audited accuracy
construct_risk: role is not a native HF field; boundary cases include base vs merge/mixed and packaging overlays

record_source_type: project-inferred from repository metadata and tags
validation_status: covered by artifact-role audit and confusion analysis
safe_claim: variant and packaging signals are observable at scale
construct_risk: a repository can combine role and packaging signals; do not treat as exclusive native taxonomy

record_source_type: mixed platform metadata, paper text extraction, and project link resolution
validation_status: alignment decomposition separates explicit links from inferred/model-card evidence
main_denominator: 191,375 repository records; 2,214 main-analysis paper records; 225 all exact edges
safe_claim: public records provide multiple paper-repository alignment signals with different strengths
construct_risk: explicit paper links, model-card back-links, and resolved exact edges are not interchangeable

record_source_type: project-derived evidence tiers from paper/family/link records
validation_status: 200-row expert lineage audit; 28.0% strict and 79.0% usable support
safe_claim: records support family-level provenance more often than exact upstream claims
construct_risk: family signal is not exact lineage and must not be presented as genealogy

safe_claim: release evidence is layered from no signal to full recipe
construct_risk: release evidence is not executable reproducibility

record_source_type: transparent operational composite from provenance, release, and link signals
validation_status: derived from validated components; composite thresholds checked by sensitivity table
safe_claim: the operational rubric summarizes how much curation evidence public records jointly provide
construct_risk: not an objective quality, preservation, adoption, or reproducibility score
